question: You must DROP and later re-create the following database objects. Give a single valid DROP order: every object must be dropped before the object it depends on — a child table before the parent it references, and a calling routine before the routine it invokes. List the scoped objects in one valid drop order, comma-separated.
answerFormat: Comma-separated list of every scoped object exactly once, in a valid drop order (dependents before dependencies).
